title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.498 - US Navy SEAL Scotty Wirtz Memorial Highway designated for portion of I-64 in St. Charles County
text:
227.498.  US Navy SEAL Scotty Wirtz Memorial Highway designated for portion of I-64 in St. Charles County. — The portion of Interstate 64 from Winghaven Boulevard to Prospect Road within the city of Lake St. Louis in St. Charles County shall be designated as "US Navy SEAL Scotty Wirtz Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 258)
